sections.paragraph:
συμβουλή, ῆς, ἡ advice, counsel (s. prec. and three next entries; Hdt. 1, 157 al.; TestSol; GrBar 3:5 ς. δοῦναι; Philo, Fuga 24; Jos., Ant. 19, 192) δέχεσθαι ς. accept advice 1 Cl 58:2.—DELG s.v. βούλομαι.

prec. prec. = preceding

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

TestSol TestSol = Testament of Solomon, I–III a.d.—List 2

GrBar GrBar = Greek Baruch (Apocalypsis Baruchi Graece)—List 2

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 957
